packages.name: Base System
packages.description: Core tools: zsh, git, curl, wget, build-essential, tmux, fzf, bat, eza

install.linux: sudo apt update && sudo apt install -y zsh tmux fzf bat eza stow curl git build-essential unzip wget apt-transport-https procps software-properties-common
install.darwin: brew install zsh tmux fzf bat eza stow curl git wget

post_install.linux: if command -v batcat &>/dev/null && ! command -v bat &>/dev/null; then sudo ln -sf "$(which batcat)" /usr/local/bin/bat; fi

install.linux: sudo install -m 0755 -d /etc/apt/keyrings && sudo curl -fsSL https://download.docker.com/linux/$(. /etc/os-release && echo "$ID")/gpg -o /etc/apt/keyrings/docker.asc && sudo chmod a+r /etc/apt/keyrings/docker.asc && echo "deb [arch=$(dpkg --print-architecture) signed-by=/etc/apt/keyrings/docker.asc] https://download.docker.com/linux/$(. /etc/os-release && echo "$ID") $(. /etc/os-release && echo "$VERSION_CODENAME") stable" | sudo tee /etc/apt/sources.list.d/docker.list > /dev/null && sudo apt update && sudo apt install -y docker-ce docker-ce-cli containerd.io docker-buildx-plugin docker-compose-plugin && sudo usermod -aG docker $USER
sudo apt update && sudo apt install -y podman
sudo apt install -y btop || (sudo add-apt-repository -y ppa:ubuntuhandbook1/btop && sudo apt update && sudo apt install -y btop)
sudo apt install -y ripgrep || cargo install ripgrep
sudo apt install -y fd-find || cargo install fd-find
sudo apt install -y fzf || (git clone --depth 1 https://github.com/junegunn/fzf ~/.fzf && ~/.fzf/install --all)
sudo apt install -y eza || cargo install eza

LAZYGIT_VERSION=$(curl -s "https://api.github.com/repos/jesseduffield/lazygit/releases/latest" | grep -oP '"tag_name": "v\K[0-9.]+') && curl -Lo lazygit.tar.gz "https://github.com/jesseduffield/lazygit/releases/latest/download/lazygit_${LAZYGIT_VERSION}_Linux_x86_64.tar.gz" && tar xf lazygit.tar.gz lazygit && sudo install lazygit /usr/local/bin && rm lazygit lazygit.tar.gz

GO_VERSION=$(curl -s https://go.dev/VERSION?m=text | head -n 1 | sed 's/go//') && wget -q "https://dl.google.com/go/go${GO_VERSION}.linux-amd64.tar.gz" -O /tmp/go.tar.gz && sudo rm -rf /usr/local/go && sudo tar -C /usr/local -xzf /tmp/go.tar.gz && rm /tmp/go.tar.gz

packages.name: pnpm
packages.description: Fast, disk space efficient Node.js package manager

install.linux: sudo apt install -y openjdk-21-jdk || (sudo add-apt-repository -y ppa:openjdk-r/ppa && sudo apt update && sudo apt install -y openjdk-21-jdk)

wget https://packages.microsoft.com/config/ubuntu/$(lsb_release -rs)/packages-microsoft-prod.deb -O packages-microsoft-prod.deb && sudo dpkg -i packages-microsoft-prod.deb && rm packages-microsoft-prod.deb && sudo apt update && sudo apt install -y dotnet-sdk-8.0
sudo apt install -y php-cli php-mbstring php-xml php-curl php-zip unzip && curl -sS https://getcomposer.org/installer | php -- --install-dir=/usr/local/bin --filename=composer
sudo apt install -y ruby-full && git clone https://github.com/rbenv/rbenv.git ~/.rbenv && git clone https://github.com/rbenv/ruby-build.git ~/.rbenv/plugins/ruby-build
git clone https://github.com/flutter/flutter.git -b stable ~/flutter && echo 'export PATH="$HOME/flutter/bin:$PATH"' >> ~/.commonrc
sudo apt install -y clang lldb lld

wget -qO /tmp/nvim.tar.gz https://github.com/neovim/neovim/releases/latest/download/nvim-linux64.tar.gz && sudo tar -C /opt -xzf /tmp/nvim.tar.gz && sudo ln -sf /opt/nvim-linux64/bin/nvim /usr/local/bin/nvim && rm /tmp/nvim.tar.gz

sudo apt install -y code || (wget -qO- https://packages.microsoft.com/keys/microsoft.asc | gpg --dearmor > packages.microsoft.gpg && sudo install -o root -g root -m 644 packages.microsoft.gpg /etc/apt/trusted.gpg.d/ && sudo sh -c 'echo "deb [arch=amd64] https://packages.microsoft.com/repos/vscode stable main" > /etc/apt/sources.list.d/vscode.list' && sudo apt update && sudo apt install -y code)

packages.name: Cursor
packages.description: AI-first code editor (fork of VS Code)

install.linux: wget -qO - https://download.sublimetext.com/sublimehq-pub.gpg | sudo gpg --dearmor -o /usr/share/keyrings/sublimetext-keyring.gpg && echo "deb [signed-by=/usr/share/keyrings/sublimetext-keyring.gpg] https://download.sublimetext.com/ apt/stable/" | sudo tee /etc/apt/sources.list.d/sublime-text.list && sudo apt update && sudo apt install -y sublime-text
curl https://pyenv.run | bash && echo 'export PATH="$HOME/.pyenv/bin:$PATH"' >> ~/.commonrc && echo 'eval "$(pyenv init -)"' >> ~/.commonrc

packages.name: pipx
packages.description: Install Python apps in isolated environments

install.linux: sudo apt install -y pipx && pipx ensurepath

curl -fsSL https://www.mongodb.org/static/pgp/server-7.0.asc | sudo gpg --dearmor -o /usr/share/keyrings/mongodb-server-7.0.gpg && echo "deb [ signed-by=/usr/share/keyrings/mongodb-server-7.0.gpg ] http://repo.mongodb.org/apt/ubuntu $(lsb_release -sc)/mongodb-org/7.0 multiverse" | sudo tee /etc/apt/sources.list.d/mongodb-org-7.0.list && sudo apt update && sudo apt install -y mongodb-org
sudo apt install -y caddy || (curl -sS https://caddyserver.com/api/download?os=linux&arch=amd64 -o /tmp/caddy.tar.gz && tar xzf /tmp/caddy.tar.gz -C /tmp && sudo mv /tmp/caddy /usr/local/bin/caddy)

sudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get install -y apt-transport-https ca-certificates curl && sudo curl -fsSLo /etc/apt/keyrings/kubernetes-archive-keyring.gpg https://packages.cloud.google.com/apt/doc/apt-key.gpg && echo "deb [signed-by=/etc/apt/keyrings/kubernetes-archive-keyring.gpg] https://apt.kubernetes.io/ kubernetes-xenial main" | sudo tee /etc/apt/sources.list.d/kubernetes.list && sudo apt update && sudo apt install -y kubectl
curl -LO https://storage.googleapis.com/minikube/latest/minikube-linux-amd64 && sudo install minikube /usr/local/bin/ && rm minikube-linux-amd64

wget -O- https://releases.hashicorp.com/terraform/latest/terraform_linux_amd64.zip | sudo tee /tmp/terraform.zip > /dev/null && sudo unzip -o /tmp/terraform.zip -d /usr/local/bin/ && rm /tmp/terraform.zip
wget -O- https://releases.hashicorp.com/packer/latest/packer_linux_amd64.zip | sudo tee /tmp/packer.zip > /dev/null && sudo unzip -o /tmp/packer.zip -d /usr/local/bin/ && rm /tmp/packer.zip

packages.name: asdf
packages.description: Multi-language version manager (Node, Python, Ruby, etc.)

install.linux: sudo apt install -y direnv || cargo install direnv
curl https://mise.run | sh && echo 'eval "$(~/.local/bin/mise activate zsh)"' >> ~/.commonrc

packages.name: Oh My Zsh + Plugins + P10k
packages.description: Oh My Zsh, zsh-autosuggestions, zsh-syntax-highlighting, Powerlevel10k

post_install.linux: ZSH_CUSTOM="${ZSH_CUSTOM:-$HOME/.oh-my-zsh/custom}" && [ ! -d "$ZSH_CUSTOM/plugins/zsh-autosuggestions" ] && git clone https://github.com/zsh-users/zsh-autosuggestions "$ZSH_CUSTOM/plugins/zsh-autosuggestions" && [ ! -d "$ZSH_CUSTOM/plugins/zsh-syntax-highlighting" ] && git clone https://github.com/zsh-users/zsh-syntax-highlighting "$ZSH_CUSTOM/plugins/zsh-syntax-highlighting" && [ ! -d "$ZSH_CUSTOM/themes/powerlevel10k" ] && git clone --depth=1 https://github.com/romkatv/powerlevel10k "$ZSH_CUSTOM/themes/powerlevel10k" && sed -i 's/^ZSH_THEME=.*/ZSH_THEME="powerlevel10k\/powerlevel10k"/g' ~/.zshrc && sed -i 's/^plugins=.*/plugins=(git zsh-autosuggestions zsh-syntax-highlighting fzf)/g' ~/.zshrc
post_install.darwin: ZSH_CUSTOM="${ZSH_CUSTOM:-$HOME/.oh-my-zsh/custom}" && [ ! -d "$ZSH_CUSTOM/plugins/zsh-autosuggestions" ] && git clone https://github.com/zsh-users/zsh-autosuggestions "$ZSH_CUSTOM/plugins/zsh-autosuggestions" && [ ! -d "$ZSH_CUSTOM/plugins/zsh-syntax-highlighting" ] && git clone https://github.com/zsh-users/zsh-syntax-highlighting "$ZSH_CUSTOM/plugins/zsh-syntax-highlighting" && [ ! -d "$ZSH_CUSTOM/themes/powerlevel10k" ] && git clone --depth=1 https://github.com/romkatv/powerlevel10k "$ZSH_CUSTOM/themes/powerlevel10k" && sed -i '' 's/^ZSH_THEME=.*/ZSH_THEME="powerlevel10k\/powerlevel10k"/g' ~/.zshrc && sed -i '' 's/^plugins=.*/plugins=(git zsh-autosuggestions zsh-syntax-highlighting fzf)/g' ~/.zshrc

install.linux: sudo apt-add-repository -y ppa:fish-shell/release-3 && sudo apt update && sudo apt install -y fish
sudo apt install -y alacritty || cargo install alacritty
sudo apt install -y kitty || (curl -L https://sw.kovidgoyal.net/kitty/installer.sh | sh /dev/stdin launch=n)
sudo apt install -y ghostty || (curl -fsSL https://ghostty.org/install.sh | bash)

packages.name: tmuxinator
packages.description: Manage complex tmux sessions via YAML

install.linux: sudo apt install -y yt-dlp || pipx install yt-dlp
sudo apt install -y gimp || sudo snap install gimp --classic
sudo apt install -y inkscape || sudo snap install inkscape --classic
sudo apt install -y age || cargo install age
sudo apt install -y sops || (wget -qO /tmp/sops https://github.com/getsops/sops/releases/latest/download/sops-*-linux.amd64.tar.gz && sudo tar xzf /tmp/sops -C /usr/local/bin/)

packages.name: HashiCorp Vault
packages.description: Secrets management & encryption as a service

install.linux: wget -O- https://releases.hashicorp.com/vault/latest/vault_linux_amd64.zip | sudo tee /tmp/vault.zip > /dev/null && sudo unzip -o /tmp/vault.zip -d /usr/local/bin/ && rm /tmp/vault.zip
sudo apt install -y trivy || curl -sfL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/aquasecurity/trivy/main/contrib/install.sh | sh -s -- -b /usr/local/bin

curl -fsSL https://cli.github.com/packages/githubcli-archive-keyring.gpg | sudo dd of=/usr/share/keyrings/githubcli-archive-keyring.gpg && echo "deb [ arch=$(dpkg --print-architecture) signed-by=/usr/share/keyrings/githubcli-archive-keyring.gpg ] https://cli.github.com/packages stable main" | sudo tee /etc/apt/sources.list.d/github-cli.list > /dev/null && sudo apt update && sudo apt install -y gh

packages.name: Ollama
packages.description: Run LLMs locally (Llama, Mistral, Gemma, etc.)

packages.name: aider --diff
packages.description: Aider in diff mode for git workflows

packages.name: Sweep AI
packages.description: AI-powered bug fixer for GitHub issues

install.linux: npm install -g playwright && npx playwright install
install.darwin: npm install -g playwright && npx playwright install

install.linux: docker run -p 3002:3002 mendableai/firecrawl && pipx install firecrawl-py
install.darwin: docker run -p 3002:3002 mendableai/firecrawl && pipx install firecrawl-py

install.linux: git clone https://github.com/comfyanonymous/ComfyUI.git && cd ComfyUI && pip install --user -r requirements.txt
install.darwin: git clone https://github.com/comfyanonymous/ComfyUI.git && cd ComfyUI && pip install --user -r requirements.txt

packages.name: Melano
packages.description: Fast offline TTS in multiple languages
